use_cases: Binary toggle controls for settings and preferences
Form inputs requiring on/off state selection
Feature flag switches in admin dashboards
Interactive boolean inputs in product interfaces
ai_summary: A Material Design 3 toggle switch component with spring physics animations and optional haptic audio feedback. Features multiple color variants (primary, destructive), two sizes (default, compact), and full accessibility support with focus-visible ring states. Uses CSS custom properties for spring easing curves to create smooth, bouncy state transitions.
